api:ai.responsibility: AI provider pipeline (extraction/generation/judge/translation) behind the AI_PROVIDER_ADAPTER port with safety filtering and prompt templates.

api:benchmark.responsibility: ai:benchmark CLI - deterministic mock mode and live real mode scoring providers with production schemas + safety guard.

api:bootstrap.responsibility: Fastify app assembly - security (helmet, multipart caps, CORS closed by default), validation wiring, versioned lifecycle, optional swagger, test harness.

api:config.responsibility: Typed zod-validated fail-fast env configuration - env.schema.ts single source, AppConfigService the only injectable surface.

api:core.responsibility: Cross-cutting backend platform - typed errors + global exception filter, pino logger, zod validation pipes, throttling, openapi shim, multipart/SSE http helpers, streaming admission + cancel registry.

api:file-security.responsibility: Upload verification chain (consent, size, MIME, magic bytes, decode, optional ClamAV fail-closed) plus in-memory buffer zero-fill.

api:game.responsibility: Analyze-game transport and orchestration - /api/v1/game analyze, SSE stream, cancel, translate-result.

api:payments.responsibility: Env-gated PayPal Orders v2 paid-analysis gate - server-priced orders, capture-at-consumption, best-effort refunds, no persistence.

api:privacy.responsibility: Log redaction (base64 runs, secrets) and the no-persistence guarantee.

api:result-aggregation.responsibility: Pure final-response shaping - displayability filter, re-rank, server-owned disclaimer and fallback.

api:share-results.responsibility: Temporary shareable results over an in-memory TTL cache port - no DB, no images, safety re-scan on create.

api:tests.responsibility: Integration suites booting production wiring via createTestApp with FakeAiAdapter and ClamAV stubs, plus shared fixtures.

shared.responsibility: Cross-side contracts package - constants, frozen ErrorCode catalog, safety wordlists, trait taxonomy, as-const enums, all shared Zod schemas, utils.

web:app.responsibility: Next.js App Router routes, root layout, providers, error boundaries; no route handlers.

web:e2e.responsibility: Playwright suites (functional/a11y/visual/mobile) against a mocked backend with the paywall pinned off.

web:game.responsibility: Core game feature module - setup, payment step, SSE progress, results, translation, share.

web:pkg-axios.responsibility: Single axios owner - HttpError normalization, zod-validated requests, and the app's only streaming fetch + SSE parser.

web:pkg-browser.responsibility: SSR-safe browser-globals facade (window/document, matchMedia, uuid, object URLs, clipboard, Web Share).

web:pkg-camera.responsibility: Camera wrapper - stream lifecycle and frame capture to File.

web:pkg-env.responsibility: Zod-validated publicEnv - the only sanctioned client process.env reader (apiBaseUrl, paypal ids, display-only price).

web:pkg-i18n.responsibility: next-intl facade - cookie-based locale, en + ar (RTL) catalogs, server/client translation helpers.

web:pkg-icons.responsibility: lucide-react facade with an explicit *Icon allowlist.

web:pkg-image.responsibility: AppImage - next/image wrapper making alt text mandatory.

web:pkg-link.responsibility: AppLink (typed internal routes) + ExternalLink (outbound-safe) - the only next/link import site.

web:pkg-logger.responsibility: Leveled app logger; debug/info muted in production appEnv.

web:pkg-paypal.responsibility: Single PayPal JS Buttons SDK wrapper - lazy one-time script injection, StrictMode-safe render, CSP origin list.

web:pkg-query.responsibility: TanStack Query facade - client factory, provider, useAppQuery/useAppMutation.

web:pkg-ui-primitives.responsibility: Design-system primitives (Button, Card, Input, Alert, Spinner, ...) with CVA variants and cn().

web:pkg-zod.responsibility: zod facade - parseSchema with SchemaParseError, re-exported z.

web:pkg-zustand.responsibility: The app's only zustand owner (createAppStore); client global state only.

web:shared.responsibility: Cross-module app code - shared components, constants, errors, helpers, hooks, CSP builder, test-id registry.

web:ui-preferences.responsibility: Theme + locale preferences (cookies, html attributes, the only zustand store).
